zh.Alton, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾阿頓
zh.Wem, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾維姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pantulf於大約1171年出生在英國史洛普爾維姆時，他的父親Hugh Pantulf28歲，母親Christiana FitzAlan30歲。他和Adeline de Verdun至少有2個女兒。他去世於1233年2月4日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維姆享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Pantulf于大约1171年出生在英国史洛普爾維姆时，他的父亲Hugh Pantulf28岁，母亲Christiana FitzAlan30岁。他和Adeline de Verdun至少有2个女儿。他去世于1233年2月4日在英国英格兰史洛普爾維姆享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pantulf was born about 1171, in Wem, Shropshire, England, his father, Hugh Pantulf, was 28 and his mother, Christiana FitzAlan, was 30. He had at least 2 daughters with Adeline de Verdun. He died on 4 February 1233, in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pantulf est né environ 1171, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Pantulf, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Christiana FitzAlan, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Adeline de Verdun. Il est décédé le 4 février 1233, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pantulf um 1171 in Wem, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Pantulf 28 und seine Mutter Christiana FitzAlan 30. Er hatte mit Adeline de Verdun mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Februar 1233 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Pantulf è nato il circa 1171 nel Wem, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Pantulf, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Christiana FitzAlan, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Adeline de Verdun. Morì il 4 febbraio 1233, nel Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pantulfが約1171年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムで生まれた時，父Hugh Pantulfは28歳，母Christiana FitzAlanは30歳であった。彼はAdeline de Verdunとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1233年2月4日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pantulf(이)가 대략 1171년 영국 슈럽실르 베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Pantulf(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana FitzAlan(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Adeline de Verdun(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1233년 2월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 베에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Pantulf nasceu aproximadamente 1171, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Pantulf, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Christiana FitzAlan, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Adeline de Verdun. Ele faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1233, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pantulf родился около 1171 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Pantulf было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana FitzAlan, 30. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Adeline de Verdun. Он умер 4 февраля 1233 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Pantulf nació aproximadamente 1171, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Pantulf, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Christiana FitzAlan, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Adeline de Verdun. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1233, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
